args:
SESS=$(tmux list-sessions -F '#{?session_attached,1,0} #{session_name}' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$SESS" ]; then DETACHED=$(printf '%s
' "$SESS" | awk '$1==0{print $2}' | sort -V); TARGET=$(printf '%s
' "$DETACHED" | sed -n 's/^sess\([0-9][0-9]*\)$/sess\1/p' | head -n1); [ -z "$TARGET" ] && TARGET=$(printf '%s
' "$DETACHED" | head -n1); if [ -n "$TARGET" ]; then exec tmux attach -t "$TARGET"; else MAX=$(printf '%s
' "$SESS" | awk '{print $2}' | sed -n 's/^sess\([0-9][0-9]*\)$/\1/p' | sort -n | tail -1); NEXT=$(( ${MAX:-0} + 1 )); exec tmux new -s "sess$NEXT"; fi; else exec tmux new -s sess1; fi
